step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a pale buttery yellow ribbed seamless tank top, matching pale yellow high-waist bike shorts, white slip-on canvas sneakers, a small gold cuff bracelet on her right wrist, hair in a low loose bun at the nape of her neck, subtle gold huggie earrings. She walks through the entrance hallway of a premium pilates studio with warm wood floor, sage-green wall on the right, a tall mirror on the left wall reflecting the studio interior, a small wooden bench against the right wall with a rolled cream towel on it. She walks toward the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, mid-stride, one foot just leaving the floor, the other planted, looking slightly off-camera to her right with a soft natural smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her left hand holds the strap of a small straw tote bag at her left side. Her right hand is at chest level slightly forward of her body, fingers in a relaxed pinch-ready position, currently empty. Soft warm morning daylight from the open front door at the end of the hallway, golden cast on the wood floor, warm rim light on her right side. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent slightly below eye line. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Arriving fresh calm energy mood, palette of pale buttery yellow, warm wood, sage green, cream. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.
